title: cornopteris oosora
intro: Cornopteris oosora, also known as the Japanese cliff fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Cornopteris oosora include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. Cornopteris oosora is often prepared as a tea or powder for herbal use, and it is also used in traditional Japanese medicine to support overall well-being.
